examples: You can have it for a tenner.
I'll give you a tenner for your old bike.
But of the advances described in 'Our Own Devices,' the only one that Tenner seems to endorse without reservation is the modern adjustable office chair.
I've still got 40 days left to meet the deadline and earn my tenner.
Dr. Scott Tenner, a Brooklyn-based gastroenterologist, signed on with Validare in 2005.
